title: Pre-Matric Scholarship — Print Application
blurb: Print or download your pre-matric fresh application.

steps.narration: Click 'Pre Matric Scholarship Services' to open the pre-matric options.

target_hint: Prematric Scholarships For SC/ST/PWD Students Fresh Registration
steps.narration: Under 'Prematric Scholarships For SC/ST/PWD Students Fresh Registration', click 'Print Application'.
Select your District, Mandal, School and Academic Year, then click the highlighted button to view and print.
